case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. CAROLE J KEALY

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT `, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED AUG-05-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEALY, CAROLE J
